requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and Network Management for Suriname EV Charging
requirement_topic.zh: 苏里南电动汽车充电的OCPP互操作与网络管理
requirement_topic.zht: 蘇里南電動汽車充電的OCPP互操作與網絡管理

summary.en: Suriname does not have a confirmed publicly documented national EV charging network management platform as of 2026-06-14 comparable to well-established systems like Qatar's Tarsheed or the Netherlands' national roaming network. EBS's 2022–2030 Corporate Strategy references plans to expand into EV charging infrastructure as a sustainable energy service, and the World Bank's Electric Mobility Pathway for Suriname project identifies network management and OCPP interoperability as key infrastructure enablers. In the absence of a mandated national EV management platform, network-connected chargers should implement OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — the internationally recognised open back-office communication protocol used across the Americas, Europe, and other IEC-aligned regions — as this is the standard most likely to be required by operators, projects, or any future Suriname national framework based on its IEC-affiliate standards posture. OCPP version requirements (1.6, 2.0.1) should be confirmed with the specific charge-point operator or project owner. EMC requirements consistent with IEC 61000 series (the IEC-affiliate framework applicable to Suriname's SSB) apply to networked EVSE; 60 Hz grid context should be specified in EMC test conditions.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，苏里南尚无经确认的公开记录的国家电动汽车充电网络管理平台，不同于卡塔尔Tarsheed或荷兰全国漫游网络等成熟体系。EBS《2022—2030年企业战略》提到扩展至电动汽车充电基础设施作为可持续能源服务的计划，世界银行《苏里南电动出行路径》项目将网络管理和OCPP互操作确定为关键基础设施使能因素。在未强制要求国家电动汽车管理平台的情况下，联网充电桩应实施OCPP（开放充电点协议）——美洲、欧洲及其他IEC体系地区广泛使用的国际公认开放式后台通信协议——因为基于苏里南SSB的IEC联络会员标准立场，这是最可能被运营商、项目或未来苏里南国家框架所要求的标准。OCPP版本要求（1.6、2.0.1）须向具体充电点运营商或项目业主确认。EMC要求符合IEC 61000系列（适用于苏里南SSB的IEC联络会员框架）；EMC测试条件中须注明60 Hz电网环境。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，蘇里南尚無經確認的公開記錄的國家電動汽車充電網絡管理平台，不同於卡塔爾Tarsheed或荷蘭全國漫遊網絡等成熟體系。EBS《2022—2030年企業戰略》提到擴展至電動汽車充電基礎設施作為可持續能源服務的計劃，世界銀行《蘇里南電動出行路徑》項目將網絡管理和OCPP互操作確定為關鍵基礎設施使能因素。在未強制要求國家電動汽車管理平台的情況下，聯網充電樁應實施OCPP（開放充電點協議）——美洲、歐洲及其他IEC體系地區廣泛使用的國際公認開放式後台通訊協議——因為基於蘇里南SSB的IEC聯絡會員標準立場，這是最可能被運營商、項目或未來蘇里南國家框架所要求的標準。OCPP版本要求（1.6、2.0.1）須向具體充電點運營商或項目業主確認。EMC要求符合IEC 61000系列（適用於蘇里南SSB的IEC聯絡會員框架）；EMC測試條件中須注明60 Hz電網環境。

standards_or_laws: OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) v1.6 / v2.0.1 — open back-office communication for networked chargers
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility (SSB IEC-affiliate reference framework)
EBS Corporate Strategy 2022–2030 — EV charging infrastructure plans
World Bank Electric Mobility Pathway for Suriname — network management and interoperability enablers

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol (CAN bus between the off-board charger and the vehicle BMS), which is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS1 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used in the Americas. China AC chargers may implement OCPP-based or proprietary back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack (CC/CP) remains incompatible with SAE J1772 / CCS1 (PP/CP) requirements. On EMC, Chinese chargers are tested under GB domestic conditions at 50 Hz; 60 Hz EMC validation specific to Suriname grid conditions would need to be confirmed.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间的CAN总线），该协议与美洲地区使用的OCPP后台系统或CCS1 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用基于OCPP或私有的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈（CC/CP）仍与SAE J1772 / CCS1（PP/CP）要求不兼容。EMC方面，中国充电桩在50 Hz国内条件下测试；针对苏里南电网条件的60 Hz EMC验证需要额外确认。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間的CAN總線），該協議與美洲地區使用的OCPP後台系統或CCS1 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用基於OCPP或私有的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧（CC/CP）仍與SAE J1772 / CCS1（PP/CP）要求不兼容。EMC方面，中國充電樁在50 Hz國內條件下測試；針對蘇里南電網條件的60 Hz EMC驗證需要額外確認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China domestic EMC standards (50 Hz baseline)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP (version to be specified by the Suriname project owner or operator) as the back-office protocol, since GB/T 27930 DC communication is not OCPP-compatible; (2) DC CCS1 stations implement IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack rather than GB/T 27930 CAN; (3) EMC evidence is obtained under IEC 61000 series at 60 Hz grid conditions, not solely 50 Hz domestic test conditions; (4) any future EBS or EAS network management platform requirements are monitored and addressed before site activation; (5) remote monitoring, fault-reporting, and load-management features are validated against the specific operator or project specification. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no OCPP implementation cannot be integrated into any OCPP-based network management system used in Suriname.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持OCPP（版本须由苏里南项目业主或运营商指定）作为后台协议，因为GB/T 27930直流通信与OCPP不兼容；(2) 直流CCS1充电站采用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈，而非GB/T 27930 CAN；(3) EMC证据在60 Hz电网条件下依据IEC 61000系列获取，而非仅凭50 Hz国内测试条件；(4) 在站点激活前监控并满足未来EBS或EAS网络管理平台的任何要求；(5) 远程监控、故障报告和负载管理功能已针对具体运营商或项目规范进行验证。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无OCPP实现的充电桩无法集成到苏里南任何基于OCPP的网络管理系统中。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持OCPP（版本須由蘇里南項目業主或運營商指定）作為後台協議，因為GB/T 27930直流通訊與OCPP不兼容；(2) 直流CCS1充電站採用IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧，而非GB/T 27930 CAN；(3) EMC證據在60 Hz電網條件下依據IEC 61000系列獲取，而非僅憑50 Hz國內測試條件；(4) 在站點激活前監控並滿足未來EBS或EAS網絡管理平台的任何要求；(5) 遠程監控、故障報告和負載管理功能已針對具體運營商或項目規範進行驗證。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無OCPP實現的充電樁無法集成到蘇里南任何基於OCPP的網絡管理系統中。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm with EAS/EBS/project owner — no mandatory national EV charging network management platform confirmed from official Suriname sources as of 2026-06-14; OCPP is the internationally standard protocol and strongly recommended given SSB's IEC-affiliate posture and Americas-region context; 60 Hz EMC validation is a practical necessity
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible and cannot substitute for OCPP back-office integration; China 50 Hz EMC test data does not cover 60 Hz grid conditions

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office implementation is the internationally standard expectation for networked chargers and should be treated as a baseline requirement for any Suriname EV charging project, given SSB's IEC-affiliate framework and the absence of a confirmed alternative platform. GB/T 27930 DC communication is not OCPP-compatible and must be replaced for CCS1 DC stations. Confirm OCPP version and any platform-specific requirements with EAS, EBS, and the project operator before deployment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台实现是联网充电桩的国际标准预期，鉴于SSB的IEC联络会员框架和无已确认替代平台的现状，应将其视为任何苏里南电动汽车充电项目的基线要求。GB/T 27930直流通信与OCPP不兼容，CCS1直流充电站必须替换。在部署前向EAS、EBS和项目运营商确认OCPP版本及任何平台特定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台實現是聯網充電樁的國際標準預期，鑑於SSB的IEC聯絡會員框架和無已確認替代平台的現狀，應將其視為任何蘇里南電動汽車充電項目的基線要求。GB/T 27930直流通訊與OCPP不兼容，CCS1直流充電站必須替換。在部署前向EAS、EBS和項目運營商確認OCPP版本及任何平台特定要求。
